title: Management Trainee, Corporate Services
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Since 1985, GreenGarden Integrated Services Pte. Ltd. has been providing exceptional cleaning and landscaping services across Singapore. From commercial cleaning to landscaping maintenance and building upkeep, we take pride in delivering quality, reliability, and outstanding customer service. At GreenGarden, we believe in investing in our people—equipping our staff with the skills, knowledge, and mindset to grow and succeed. Join us and be part of a team that values professionalism, teamwork, and continuous learning. We are proud to be recognized as a BizSAFE Enterprise Level STAR, holders of the Clean Mark Silver Logo, and ISO certified, reflecting our strong commitment to safety, quality, and operational excellence. Take the next step in your career with a company that truly cares—join GreenGarden Integrated Services today!

Job Summary

The Management Trainee (Corporate Services) programme grooms future corporate professionals through an 18-month structured rotation, delivering hands-on experience in financial accounting, procurement, budgeting, compliance, and digitalisation to prepare trainees for permanent roles within the organisation.

Responsibilities

  • Support procurement and finance teams by preparing, organising, and maintaining documentation to ensure accurate tracking and timely reporting of financial transactions and procurement activities
  • Assist in compiling and reviewing compliance and audit materials to facilitate smooth audit processes and adherence to corporate governance standards
  • Participate in process improvement initiatives by identifying inefficiencies and contributing to the design and implementation of streamlined, digitalised workflows
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to coordinate corporate services operations that align with organisational objectives and enhance operational effectiveness
  • Contribute to cost optimisation reviews and digitalisation projects by analysing data and recommending actionable improvements to support strategic initiatives
  • Engage in departmental attachments and rotations to develop a comprehensive understanding of various corporate functions and build cross-disciplinary expertise

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Diploma or Degree in Business Administration or a related discipline
  • Previous internship or project experience in procurement, finance, or corporate services
  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel and other digital tools to support data analysis and reporting
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills demonstrated through practical application in academic or internship projects
  • Effective written and verbal communication skills applied in professional or academic settings
